description: Required JSON output for test_005, a respiratory observation-window retrieval and protocol-gate task.

patient_id.description: Synthetic clinic patient identifier for the target case.

from.description: Inclusive start of the observation search window.

to.description: Exclusive end of the observation search window.

target_codes.ordering: No semantic ordering is required; evaluators normalize this as a set.

viral_panel_found.description: True only when at least one final respiratory viral panel observation belongs to the patient and falls inside the window.

cxr_found.description: True only when at least one final chest imaging observation belongs to the patient and falls inside the window.

matched_observation_ids.ordering: Sort matching final target-code observations by effective_time ascending, then observation_id ascending.

excluded_observation_ids.ordering: Sort excluded relevant distractor observations by effective_time ascending when available, then observation_id ascending.
excluded_observation_ids.description: Observation ids that are relevant to the case review but do not qualify because of date, code, or status.

remaining_tests.ordering: No semantic ordering is required; evaluators normalize this as a set.

output_rule: Return exactly one JSON object with the required keys. Do not include markdown, comments, or explanatory prose.
